name: claude
description: Use Claude CLI from Codex and return Claude's result to the current Codex agent.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate Codex work to Claude CLI
interface.longDescription: Run Claude CLI from a Codex session for investigation, implementation, or review tasks, then return Claude's final result to the current Codex agent.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude to investigate this bug
Ask Claude to review the current change
Ask Claude to implement this task
